summary: Iteration 131: Tested Auto Vehicle Weight feature changes - Scale auto-connects, RST editable, Delete in pending list. All 14 features tested and working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test vehicle weight entry (RST #999) during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Auto Vehicle Weight features tested and working: 1) Scale auto-connects on page load (1.5s delay), no Simulate/Stop buttons 2) STABLE - LOCKED badge appears when weight stabilizes 3) COM3 Connected badge always shows green 4) Capture (Zap) button appears next to First Weight when stable 5) RST Edit button toggles editable input for custom RST 6) Custom RST sent to backend and used 7) Delete button in Pending Vehicle List works 8) Delete button in Completed Entries works 9) Second weight inline capture works

scale_auto_connects.details: useLiveScale auto-starts on mount (1.5s delay), weight starts measuring automatically

stable_locked_badge.details: STABLE - LOCKED badge appears in green when weight stabilizes

no_simulate_stop_buttons.details: No Simulate/Stop buttons visible on weighbridge display

com3_connected_badge.details: COM3 Connected badge always shows green in header

capture_zap_button.details: Capture (Zap) button appears next to First Weight input when scale is stable

rst_edit_button.details: RST badge has Edit button that toggles editable input field

custom_rst_to_backend.details: Custom RST number (999) was sent to backend and used for the entry

delete_pending_entries.details: Delete button visible in Pending Vehicle List Actions column, works correctly

delete_completed_entries.details: Delete button visible in Completed Entries Actions column, works correctly

create_first_weight.details: Created new first weight entry, appeared in pending list

second_weight_inline_capture.details: Clicking 2nd Wt button loads entry into form, shows First Wt (Gross), Second Wt (Tare) input with Capture button

backend_delete_api.details: DELETE /api/vehicle-weight/{id} works for both pending and completed entries

backend_all_apis.details: All 9 backend API tests passed: next-rst, create auto/custom RST, pending list, second weight update, delete pending/completed, get by RST, list all

mocked_apis.live_scale: Web Serial hardware connection is MOCKED (useLiveScale auto-simulates weight measurement on page load)
